name: Checkpoint Command Post
description: A low concrete building behind the eastern barrier, its windows fogged with condensation, containing three security phones, a wall-mounted map of the checkpoint perimeter, and a break room television still showing the state broadcast. The phones ring and go unanswered. The fluorescent light above the duty desk flickers every forty seconds.
atmosphericDetails: The metallic click of a security phone receiver hitting the cradle — the third unanswered call in twenty minutes
A half-eaten plate of Schnitzel on the duty desk, gone cold, beside an open logbook with the last entry timestamped 20:47
The muffled roar of the crowd outside is present in every room, a constant low-frequency vibration that can be felt through the soles of boots on the concrete floor
